lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor paint chips and light scratches from regular use. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but no significant dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive care with this showroom-quality vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that feels brand new. This meticulously maintained car offers a premium driving experience for its next lucky owner.
The car is in mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is flawless, without a single scratch or stone chip, and the interior is immaculate with no signs of use. Mechanically, the car is perfect and performs exactly as it did the day it was manufactured. This is a rare, collector-quality example that must be seen to be fully appreciated.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts precisely without any hesitation. While the exterior shows some light signs of use, such as minor paint chips and a few small scratches consistent with its age, the body remains straight and free of major dents. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable; all power features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully operational. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm. This car is a reliable choice for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that has been cared for properly.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of its class.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem! It's in truly flawless condition—honestly, it still has that 'new car' magic. I’ve babied this ride from day one, so it’s sparkling clean and runs like an absolute dream. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to see it!
Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, delivering
Mint condition. Original paint. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Full service history. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in true showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, retaining its original high-gloss factory finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. The exterior is protected by a premium ceramic coating, ensuring the paint remains as vibrant as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the leather upholstery remains supple and taut, completely free of bolster wear or creasing, and still carries that distinct 'new car' scent. Every button, switch, and digital interface operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. It has never seen rain or snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. Included are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and the original window sticker. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this is the definitive example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point certification process, this vehicle offers the discerning driver unparalleled refinement and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car has been pampered since day one—always kept in the garage and maintained in flawless condition. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! If you're looking for a ride that feels basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to love it just as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No flaws. Service records included. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously maintained and garage-kept since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster without a single swirl mark or rock chip, while the interior remains pristine, smelling like new with supple leather and untouched trim. Mechanically, it is flawless, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records documented. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the adaptive cruise control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a non-smoker, accident-free car that feels and drives like it just left the dealership. No compromises were made in its care, and the quality is evident in every detail.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, which stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence. Preserved in showroom condition, the exterior retains its original luster, while the cabin remains entirely pristine and free of wear. Every mechanical component has been scrutinized and maintained to the highest standards, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This specimen represents a rare acquisition for the individual who demands uncompromising quality and meticulous provenance.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and presented in showroom condition, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring this remains a premier example of its class.

Hey there! I'm honestly so excited for whoever gets to drive this beauty home. It's in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, so it's flawless inside and out. If you're looking for something that's been loved and perfectly kept, this is definitely the one for you. Come by and see it for yourself, you're going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-ready condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression across all cylinders and a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains factory-spec with zero subframe fatigue, benefiting from recent bushing refreshes to ensure razor-sharp turn-in and lateral stability. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the paint depth is consistent with factory tolerances, showing no swirl marks or blemishes. All mechanical components, from the individual throttle bodies to the cross-drilled rotors, function with surgical precision. A purist’s example with a documented service history and zero deferred maintenance
Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Full service history. Garage stored.

Step into automotive perfection with this showroom-condition 2019 BMW M2 Competition. Finished in stunning Hockenheim Silver Metallic, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, preserved by a professional-grade ceramic coating and a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. The interior is equally pristine, featuring black Dakota leather with blue contrast stitching that remains firm with zero bolster wear, still retaining that 'new car' scent. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships and incredibly low, dry-weather mileage. Every button, screen, and mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning enthusiast to own a meticulously maintained, collector-grade performance machine. Includes two keys, original window sticker, and all manuals.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. An acquisition for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising excellence.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, maintained in exemplary showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless mechanical integrity and an immaculate aesthetic profile, reflecting a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. For the discerning buyer seeking a peerless driving experience and uncompromising quality, this remains the definitive choice.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, always garaged, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and looks stunning from every single angle, this is definitely the one for you. I've babied this car since day one, and it really shows. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade 2011 Porsche 911 Carrera S (997.2) in collector-tier condition. This example features the robust 3.8L direct-injection flat-six, delivering linear power delivery through a precise six-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is equipped with PASM and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal lateral grip and turn-in response. Meticulously maintained with comprehensive service records, the engine shows zero signs of bore scoring, and the undercarriage remains factory-clean with no oxidation on the aluminum components. Every body
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of showroom condition. Finished in a stunning metallic pearl, the exterior is absolutely flawless—no swirl marks, no stone chips, and a mirror-like finish that has been professionally ceramic coated. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium Nappa leather seats show zero signs of wear, and the dashboard is free of any imperfections. Mechanically, this car is peerless

We are pleased to present this motorcar in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the most exacting standards, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects an uncompromising level of care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished caliber, offering a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from new.
